race.comment: SEISMIC BOOM (7) was well supported at Eagle Farm on debut and didn't let backers down with a strong victory over 1000m. Revved up for this with two recent trials and looks the one they all have to run down. OVER DRAFT (2) resumes here but the form he showed when last in work was good enough for a race of this calibre. Gets 2kg off and can run a race while fresh. SEAMS LOGICAL (1) may have suffered from the dreaded second-up syndrome last time out but the form prior was full of merit. Can bounce right back against this line-up. MISHANI MOET (10) gets in well at the weights with the claim and should get a cosy run in transit from gate four. In the mix. EXOFLOW (9) rounds out the selections.
